\\lambda_{IB}.description: External arrival rate at the Inbound Broker

\\mu_{IB}.description: Service rate at the Inbound Broker

\\chi_{IB}.description: Effective throughput at IB: chi = lambda*(1-epsilon)

c_{IB}.description: Number of parallel service instances at IB

d_{req_{IB}}.description: Weighted average data density at IB: 20% write (2 MB) + 80% read (0.01 MB)

L_{IB}.description: Average number of requests at IB

Lq_{IB}.description: Average requests waiting in IB buffer

W_{IB}.description: Average time to complete a request at IB

Wq_{IB}.description: Average time waiting in IB buffer

M_{act_{IB}}.description: Memory used by active/queued requests at IB: L * d_req

\\lambda_{IW}.description: Archival write request rate routed to IW (20% of IB)

\\mu_{IW}.description: Service rate at the Image Writer Component

c_{IW}.description: Number of parallel service instances at IW

d_{req_{IW}}.description: DICOM archival write payload density at IW

L_{IW}.description: Average number of requests at IW

Lq_{IW}.description: Average requests waiting in IW buffer

W_{IW}.description: Average time to complete a write request at IW

Wq_{IW}.description: Average time waiting in IW buffer

M_{act_{IW}}.description: Memory used by active/queued requests at IW: L * d_req

M_{buf_{IW}}.description: Allocated buffer memory at IW: K * d_req

\\lambda_{IR}.description: Retrieval read request rate routed to IR (80% of IB)

\\mu_{IR}.description: Service rate at the Image Reader Component

c_{IR}.description: Number of parallel service instances at IR

d_{req_{IR}}.description: Retrieval query payload density at IR (small query command)

L_{IR}.description: Average number of requests at IR

Lq_{IR}.description: Average requests waiting in IR buffer

W_{IR}.description: Average time to process a read request at IR

Wq_{IR}.description: Average time waiting in IR buffer

M_{act_{IR}}.description: Memory used by active requests at IR: L * d_req

M_{buf_{IR}}.description: Allocated buffer memory at IR: K * d_req

\\lambda_{DB}.description: Aggregate arrival rate at DB: lambda_AWS + lambda_RRS = 100 req/s

\\mu_{DB}.description: Service rate at the Database Component

d_{req_{DB}}.description: Weighted average data density at DB: same mix as IB (20% write + 80% read)

L_{DB}.description: Average number of requests at DB (M/M/1 at rho=0.333: L = rho/(1-rho) = 0.5)

Lq_{DB}.description: Average requests waiting in DB buffer

W_{DB}.description: Average time at DB: bottleneck node W = 1/(mu*(1-rho)) = 0.005s

Wq_{DB}.description: Average time waiting in DB buffer

M_{act_{DB}}.description: Memory used by active requests at DB: L * d_req = 0.5 * 0.408 = 0.204 MB

\\lambda_{WN}.description: Archival acknowledgement rate at WN (20% of DB output)

\\mu_{WN}.description: Service rate at the Write Notifier Component

c_{WN}.description: Number of parallel service instances at WN

d_{req_{WN}}.description: Write acknowledgement payload density at WN (small ACK response)

L_{WN}.description: Average number of requests at WN

Lq_{WN}.description: Average requests waiting in WN buffer

W_{WN}.description: Average time to assemble archival ACK at WN

Wq_{WN}.description: Average time waiting in WN buffer

M_{act_{WN}}.description: Memory used by active requests at WN: L * d_req = 0.04 * 0.005 = 0.0002 MB

\\lambda_{RN}.description: Retrieval image reply rate at RN (80% of DB output)

\\mu_{RN}.description: Service rate at the Read Notifier Component

c_{RN}.description: Number of parallel service instances at RN

d_{req_{RN}}.description: DICOM retrieval image payload density at RN (d_img_R)

L_{RN}.description: Average number of requests at RN

Lq_{RN}.description: Average requests waiting in RN buffer

W_{RN}.description: Average time to assemble and deliver retrieved image at RN

Wq_{RN}.description: Average time waiting in RN buffer

M_{act_{RN}}.description: Memory used by active requests at RN: L * d_img = 0.16 * 10 = 1.6 MB

\\lambda_{OB}.description: Aggregate response rate at Outbound Broker: WN + RN = 100 req/s

\\mu_{OB}.description: Service rate at the Outbound Broker

\\chi_{OB}.description: Effective throughput at OB (responses delivered to clients)

c_{OB}.description: Number of parallel service instances at OB

d_{req_{OB}}.description: Weighted average response density at OB: 20% ACK (0.005 MB) + 80% image (10 MB) = 8.0 MB/req

L_{OB}.description: Average number of responses at OB

Lq_{OB}.description: Average responses waiting in OB buffer

W_{OB}.description: Average time to aggregate and relay a response at OB

Wq_{OB}.description: Average time waiting in OB buffer

M_{act_{OB}}.description: Memory used by active responses at OB: L * d_res = 0.1 * 8.0 = 0.8 MB

enviroments._note: P[k][i][j] = routing probability from node i to node j under scenario k. Diagonal = epsilon (1% self-loop/error). Only IB (row 0) and DB (row 3) vary across scenarios. OB row sums to 0.01 — remaining probability exits the network.
